title: RECPDCL Senior Executive Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
org: REC Power Development and Consultancy Limited (RECPDCL)
shortInfo: REC Power Development and Consultancy Limited (RECPDCL) Recruitment 2026: REC Power Development and Consultancy Limited has released the official notification for 3 Senior Executive (Tech.)-Lead Verifier posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates in Across India. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking stable and well-paid PSU jobs.

basic_details.job_title: RECPDCL Senior Executive Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: REC Power Development and Consultancy Limited (RECPDCL)
basic_details.short_information: REC Power Development and Consultancy Limited (RECPDCL) Recruitment 2026: REC Power Development and Consultancy Limited has released the official notification for 3 Senior Executive (Tech.)-Lead Verifier posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates in Across India. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking stable and well-paid PSU jobs.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 48 years Age Relaxation: SC/ST: 5 Years OBC-NCL: 3 Years PwBD: 10 years (in addition to applicable category relaxation)

qualification.education_qualification: Degree in Engineering/Technology or Bachelor of Science with relevant experience.
qualification.details: Senior Executive (Tech.)-Lead Verifier (Compliance): As per The Bureau of Energy Efficiency (Qualification for Accredited Energy Auditors and Maintenance of the List) Regulations, 2010 with 13 years of experience. Senior Executive (Tech.)- Lead Verifier (Offset): Engineering Graduate (Bachelor of Engineering/Bachelor of Technology) or equivalent (Or) Bachelor of Science or equivalent with 13 years out of which min. 5 years' experience in validation and/or verification activity as team member in CDM or VCM activities.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 1,35,000/- per month plus other benefits.

selection_process: Shortlisted Candidates shall be called for Personal Interview
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 06-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of RECPDCL to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for RECPDCL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit online applications for RECPDCL Recruitment 2026 is 06 June 2026. Candidates are advised to apply well before the deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Senior Executive (Tech.)-Lead Verifier post?
faq.answer: The educational qualification required is a Degree in Engineering/Technology or Bachelor of Science with relevant experience. Specific qualifications vary slightly between the Compliance and Offset roles.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the RECPDCL Senior Executive posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all posts is 48 years. Age relaxation is applicable for SC/ST, OBC-NCL, and PwBD candidates as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Senior Executive (Tech.)-Lead Verifier position?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies for the Senior Executive (Tech.)-Lead Verifier post, distributed between the Compliance and Offset roles.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Senior Executive (Tech.)-Lead Verifier role?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a consolidated pay of Rs. 1,35,000/- per month, along with other admissible benefits as per company policy.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications for RECPDCL Recruitment 2026 must be submitted online through the official website of RECPDCL.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for RECPDCL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment. Candidates should check the official notification for any updates regarding fees.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Senior Executive (Tech.)-Lead Verifier posts?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting candidates based on their applications, followed by a Personal Interview for the eligible candidates.

faq.question: Q9. What is the nature of the job?
faq.answer: The job is on a contract basis for the post of Senior Executive (Tech.)-Lead Verifier.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF and the online application link can be found in the "Important Links" section of this article. You can also visit the official website of RECPDCL.
